title: Surgeon Vacancy at Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates:
Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates!
